hero.subtitle: Sacred talismans of protection
hero.description: Forged from ancient rituals and forgotten traditions. Each object is a vessel of intention, crafted for the modern seeker to guard the spiritual path and manifest sacred harmony.

story.title: The Temple
story.p1: Where ancient symbols meet modern protection. Our sacred talismans are crafted with intention, echoing the spiritual legacy of forgotten temples and the timeless wisdom of sacred geometry.
story.p2: Each piece is a vessel of energy, a silent guardian for the contemporary soul, carrying the weight of ritual and the beauty of sacred arts.

names.pixiu-two-faces-fortune: PIXIU : THE TWO FACES OF FORTUNE
names.koi-flow-abundance-red-string: KOI — FLOW OF ABUNDANCE RED STRING BRACELET
names.lucky-coin-wealth-bracelet-red-beads-fen: WEALTH COIN BRACELET — ABUNDANCE & FENG SHUI

shunyata.name: SUTRA OF THE SILENT HEART
shunyata.intro: A companion for the modern seeker. This talisman serves as a silent anchor, a physical manifestation of inner stillness through perpetual motion.

story.title: The Sacred Script
story.body: Crafted with a premium silver finish, the outer rim is meticulously engraved with the ancient characters of the Heart Sutra—the cornerstone of Buddhist wisdom. The script wraps around the piece like a protective veil, carrying the vibration of centuries of ritual chanting.
story.core_body: At its center lies the serene countenance of the Buddha, designed with a precision mechanical mechanism. This movement mirrors the turning of the Wheel of Dharma, providing a tactile focus for mindfulness.
story.presence_body: Measuring 42mm in diameter, the pendant exhibits a profound weight. Its weathered patina suggests an object recovered from a forgotten temple, carrying the silence of lost eras.

features: Ancestral Wisdom: Hand-engraved Heart Sutra characters for spiritual alignment.
Mechanical Grace: Smooth 360° rotating center for tactile meditation.
Versatile Protection: Ideal for daily wear, meditation, or energetic shielding.
Sacred Packaging: Delivered in a ritual silk pouch with an authenticity card.

items.q: What is the significance of the rotating center?
items.a: The rotation signifies the 'Turning of the Wheel,' an ancient symbol for teaching enlightenment. It serves as a physical focus for mindfulness.
Yes, the characters are classical traditional Chinese script of the Prajnaparamita (Heart Sutra), reproduced with absolute respect for the sacred text.

items.q: How should I wear this talisman?
items.a: It is balanced to rest perfectly against the heart center. We share it on a reinforced sacred cord, but it can be transferred to a chain of your choosing.
